violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Different species of raw animal food * was not properly separated from each other or arranged according to minimum cooking temperatures. > Upstairs Pepsi cooler containing animal products did not have raw products properly separated. Observed ground beef next to chicken.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. > Found two metal spoons being stored in food items (sour cream and chili oil) being used. Use clean utensils or single use utensils.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. > Discovered many house made sauces and cut fruits not discarded within 10 calendar days of preparation in upstairs walk in cooler. Discarded with staff.
Contaminated food disposition. — --Unsafe, adulterated or contaminated food was not discarded as required. > Discovered some moldy jalapenos in downstairs walk in cooler. Discarded with staff.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. > Inside of convection ovens in the downstairs prep area need thorough cleaning. Lots of buildup over time.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. > Observed dishwashing employee fill a dish bucket in the handwash sink. Corrected on site with employee.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. > Downstairs prep kitchen has a missing ceiling tile that needs replaced.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
